sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6782" key="a)nakopte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνα-κοπτέον</orth>, <sense id="n6782.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must remove, eliminate,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:90" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.90</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
